topic: Gumloop Review 2026: AI-Native Workflow Automation Platform

key_points: Positions Gumloop as the most intuitive no-code automation tool for AI-first workflows
Highlights drag-and-drop builder and visual flow creation as key differentiators
Covers honest pros and cons including opaque credit costs and limited integrations
Compares against traditional tools like Zapier as a newer, AI-native alternative
Comprehensive feature breakdown including AI model integrations (GPT-5, Claude 4 Opus, Gemini 2.5 Pro)
Covers the $50M Series B funding round led by Benchmark in March 2026
Discusses credit-based pricing model and how costs escalate for complex workflows
Positions Gumloop as best for growth/marketing teams doing AI-heavy automation
Categorizes Gumloop as AI Infrastructure and MLOps tool
Covers pricing plans: Free (5k credits), Pro ($37/month, 20k+ credits), Enterprise (custom)
Mentions SOC 2 and GDPR compliance as enterprise security features
Highlights Gumloop YC W24 origin and $70M total funding
In-depth hands-on review with practical workflow building examples
Covers built-in AI assistant 'Gummies' for workflow troubleshooting
Discusses subflows for building reusable workflow components
Addresses learning curve and initial overwhelming experience for new users
Reviews Gumloop from a features-first perspective covering all core capabilities
Covers auto-align, snap-to-grid, and collapsible nodes as canvas ergonomics
Discusses 125+ integrations vs Zapier's 6,000+ as a significant gap
Highlights MCP nodes as a way to bridge the integration gap

stats.fact: Gumloop raised $50M Series B in March 2026 led by Benchmark, with participation from Nexus Venture Partners, First Round Capital, Y Combinator, Box Group, and Shopify Ventures
Gumloop total funding reached $70M as of 2026
Gumloop was founded as a Y Combinator Winter 2024 (W24) startup
Gumloop holds a 4.8/5 rating on G2 (from 6 verified reviews as of 2026)
Gumloop Free plan includes 5,000 credits/month with 1 seat and 2 concurrent runs
Gumloop Pro plan costs $37/month and includes 20,000+ credits, unlimited seats, and 5 concurrent runs
Gumloop offers 125+ integrations compared to Zapier's 6,000+
Gumloop natively supports GPT-5, Claude 4 Opus, Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Gemini 2.5 Pro with new frontier models added within days of release
Gumloop offers a 14-day free trial on paid plans
n8n Cloud starts at $20/month while Zapier paid plans start at $19.99/month for 750 tasks

angles: AI-native from the ground up: unlike Zapier/Make that bolt AI on, Gumloop was built AI-first — this is its core architectural differentiator in 2026
The 'every employee becomes an AI engineer' vision: Gumloop's $50M bet on democratizing AI agent building for non-developers
Credit-based pricing trap: how the opaque cost model (e.g., 60 credits per contact for enrichment) can make Gumloop expensive at scale
125 integrations vs 6,000: why Gumloop's limited connector library is its biggest weakness and how MCP nodes are bridging the gap
Best-in-class multi-model access: native support for GPT-5, Claude 4 Opus, Gemini 2.5 Pro as a competitive moat over legacy automation tools
Real-world ROI: practical use cases for growth and marketing teams — lead enrichment, cold email personalization, influencer outreach, content automation
Who should NOT use Gumloop: when Zapier's 6,000 integrations, n8n's self-hosted control, or Make's budget pricing wins

H2: Who Should Use Gumloop (And Who Shouldn't)
